title: selaginella buergersiana
intro: Selaginella buergersiana, also known as the Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is native to New Guinea and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella buergersiana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella buergersiana can be prepared as a tea or capsule by drying and grinding the leaves, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues.
